extraction_policy: Every relationship observation must be supported by current narrative-unit text.
Write all natural-language output values in the same language as the current narrative unit, except for exact names, codes, and schema labels.
Use only source_entity and target_entity names that appear in the extracted KG entity candidates for this unit.

Extract only durable story-state relationships that may persist beyond the current narrative unit, including explicitly stated mentorship, teacher/student or master/apprentice roles, explicitly legal guardianship/custody, care commitments, teammate/comrade or shared mission bonds, protection duties, family ties, affiliation, command/reporting, and explicit long-term responsibility.

Use care_commitment_to or care_responsibility_for for promises such as 'I will take care of him'; do not upgrade care, advice, familiarity, or operation reminders into legal guardianship, kinship, mentorship, command, or work hierarchy unless that formal role is explicit in the source text.
A shared activity is not enough by itself; teammate/comrade/mission_partner requires a durable shared role, mission, unit, or profession anchored in the current text.
Do not extract one-off actions, demonstrations, addressing, looking at, analyzing, reviewing, speaking to, displayed-on relations, physical contact, or temporary tool use as relationships.
Every evidence field must be an exact contiguous substring copied from the current narrative unit's title, subtitle, or content.
Use an empty relationship_observations array when no durable relationship is directly supported.
The output must be parseable JSON.
